title: hieracium microtum subsp. chlorochroma
intro: Hieracium microtum subsp. chlorochroma is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, specifically a yellow-flowering variety with greenish-yellow leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium microtum subsp. chlorochroma include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used as an ingredient in some traditional remedies for gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions.
